name: Old-Time Meatloaf
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Cracker or dry bread crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the beef, veal, and pork in a food processor and pulse until combined.
2. Add the beaten eggs, cracker or dry bread crumbs, salt, pepper, sage, or other desired seasonings.
3. Mix all ingredients together until well incorporated.
4. Shape the mixture into a loaf.
5. Place the loaf in a roasting pan.
6. Bake for one hour at 375°F.
Source: Heritage Recipes Chatelaine.ch
